title: Pneumococcal vaccine counseling
specialty: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation

investigations.text: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.
investigations.rationale: Supports clinician assessment of entered contraindications and precautions for pneumococcal vaccine counselling; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization

investigations.text: Defines consent context, scheduled-dose and history checks, illness, previous severe reaction, immune status, medication and recent-vaccine screening.
investigations.rationale: Supports consent, preparation and screening documentation for pneumococcal vaccine counselling; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Defines consent context, scheduled-dose and history checks, illness, previous severe reaction, immune status, medication and recent-vaccine screening.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization

exact_section.heading: 15. Recommendation Eleven: Vaccine Administration and Recording — consent, preparation, screening, and interview questions

safety_netting.text: Requires benefits and risks discussion and after-care information on common effects, when to seek attention, and when to notify the facility.
safety_netting.rationale: Supports clinician-delivered education and aftercare documentation for pneumococcal vaccine counselling; no decision is generated.
safety_netting.evidence_extract: Requires benefits and risks discussion and after-care information on common effects, when to seek attention, and when to notify the facility.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, risk condition, vaccine history, eligibility, contraindications, product, schedule, dose, route, administration and follow-up remain absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, certification or disposition is generated for pneumococcal vaccine counselling.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
